title: Odyssey, Book 20: Before the Slaughter
description: Book 20 of Homer's Odyssey: Before the Slaughter.
introduction: Book 20 of the Odyssey: Before the Slaughter. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.original_text: Αὐτὰρ ὁ ἐν προδόμῳ εὐνάζετο δῖος Ὀδυσσεύς.
translation.text: Odysseus lay awake planning the slaughter. Athena came to him and promised victory. Omens confirmed the gods' support. The suitors feasted one last time, mocking the beggar, not knowing this was their final meal.
